description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a structured silhouette and a plaid-patterned fabric upholstery in shades of blue, gray, and subtle tan. The sofa features two large, loose seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a clean-lined, contemporary appearance. The legs are short, block-shaped, and appear to be made of a dark wood or metal, positioned at each corner for stability. The upholstery has a visually textured, woven look with a grid-like plaid pattern, giving the sofa a stylish yet urban feel. This piece would be suitable for placement in public urban spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered lounges.
description: A modern, boxy sofa with blue-gray plaid upholstery, two large seat and back cushions, and straight armrests. It features short, blocky legs and a clean, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full plaid pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's boxy armrest, cushion thickness, and short block leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the plaid fabric wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and leg design seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size and placed side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-shaped legs at each corner, likely wood or metal, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with two loose back cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Plaid-patterned upholstery in blue, gray, and tan, with a woven, textured appearance and no visible decorative stitching.
